languages.text: {n}Разведчики докладывают, что им пришлось долго искать безопасные подступы к указанному месту — хищная ксенофлора встретила незваных гостей ядом и шипами. Вокс-писец не солгал: глубоко внизу, у основания корней, притаились причудливые ксеносские строения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Разведчики докладывают, что им пришлось долго искать безопасные подступы к указанному месту — хищная ксенофлора встретила незваных гостей ядом и шипами. Вокс-писец не солгал: глубоко внизу, у основания корней, притаились причудливые ксеносские строения.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The scouts report a lengthy search for a safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora greets these uninvited guests with poison and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lie bizarre xenos structures.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Разведчики докладывают, что им пришлось долго искать безопасные подступы к указанному месту — хищная ксенофлора встретила незваных гостей ядом и шипами. Вокс-писец не солгал: глубоко внизу, у основания корней, притаились причудливые ксеносские строения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The scouts report a long search for safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora meets the uninvited guests with venom and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lay bizarre xenos structures.{/n}

{n}The scouts report a lengthy search for a safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora greets these uninvited guests with poison and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lie bizarre xenos structures.{/n}

{n}The coordinates received from the Throne agent's vox-scribe unexpectedly come to the rescue. Four search teams set out on a reconnaissance mission. Only one of them returns — a little worse for wear, but with a wealth of cartographical data, vid-recordings, and extensive analytical data.{/n}

{n}The scouts report a long search for safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora meets the uninvited guests with venom and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lay bizarre xenos structures.{/n}

{n}The scouts report a lengthy search for a safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora greets these uninvited guests with poison and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lie bizarre xenos structures.{/n}

languages.text: {n}王家のスパイのボイス・スクライバーから届いた座標が、思わぬ救世主となる。4つの探査隊が偵察に出るが、そのうち1つだけが帰還する。傷はついているが、豊富な地図データ、映像記録、そして膨大な分析データをもたらした。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The coordinates received from the Throne agent's vox-scribe unexpectedly come to the rescue. Four search teams set out on a reconnaissance mission. Only one of them returns — a little worse for wear, but with a wealth of cartographical data, vid-recordings, and extensive analytical data.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Keşif erleri, verilen koordinatlara giden güvenli geçidi uzun süre aradıklarını rapor ediyor. Yırtıcı zeno florası, davetsiz misafirleri zehir ve dikenlerle karşılıyor. Voks kâtibi doğruyu söylemiş: Derinlerde, köklerin tabanına yuvalanmış tuhaf zeno yapıları yatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouts report a lengthy search for a safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora greets these uninvited guests with poison and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lie bizarre xenos structures.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Keşif erleri, verilen koordinatlara giden güvenli geçidi uzun süre aradıklarını rapor ediyor. Yırtıcı zeno florası, davetsiz misafirleri zehir ve dikenlerle karşılıyor. Voks kâtibi doğruyu söylemiş: Derinlerde, köklerin tabanına yuvalanmış tuhaf zeno yapıları yatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}侦察兵汇报称，他们花了很长时间才找到通往给定坐标的安全路线——那些掠食成性的异形植物用毒液与荆棘迎接了不速之客。音阵通讯器的坐标没错：在根须底部深处确实矗立着诡异的异形建筑。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouts report a lengthy search for a safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora greets these uninvited guests with poison and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lie bizarre xenos structures.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}侦察兵汇报称，他们花了很长时间才找到通往给定坐标的安全路线——那些掠食成性的异形植物用毒液与荆棘迎接了不速之客。音阵通讯器的坐标没错：在根须底部深处确实矗立着诡异的异形建筑。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Späher berichten von einer längeren Suche nach einem sicheren Weg zu den gesuchten Koordinaten, da die räuberische Xenoflora die ungebetenen Gäste mit Gift und Dornen begrüßt hat. Der Voxschreiber hatte recht. Tief unten, an der Basis der Wurzeln, befinden sich bizarre Xenos-Strukturen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouts report a lengthy search for a safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora greets these uninvited guests with poison and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lie bizarre xenos structures.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Späher berichten von einer längeren Suche nach einem sicheren Weg zu den gesuchten Koordinaten, da die räuberische Xenoflora die ungebetenen Gäste mit Gift und Dornen begrüßt hat. Der Voxschreiber hatte recht. Tief unten, an der Basis der Wurzeln, befinden sich bizarre Xenos-Strukturen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les éclaireurs ont longtemps cherché un passage sûr vers les coordonnées indiquées, la xénoflore prédatrice accueillant les intrus à grand renfort de poison et d'épines. Le scribe-vox disait vrai : dans les profondeurs, nichées à la base des racines, se dressent d'étranges structures xénos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouts report a lengthy search for a safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora greets these uninvited guests with poison and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lie bizarre xenos structures.{/n}

Le scribe-vox disait vrai : dans les profondeurs, nichées à la base des racines, se dressent d'étranges structures xénos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los exploradores informan de una búsqueda prolongada de una ruta segura hacia las coordenadas indicadas, ya que la xenoflora depredadora recibe a las visitas inesperadas con espinas y veneno. El vocoescriba estaba en lo cierto: en las profundidades, junto a la base de las raíces, hay una serie de extrañas estructuras xenos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The scouts report a lengthy search for a safe passage to the given coordinates — the predatory xenoflora greets these uninvited guests with poison and thorns. The vox-scribe spoke true: deep beneath, nestled at the base of the roots, lie bizarre xenos structures.{/n}
